sprint.summary: 27 commits. Full harness installed: 34 doctrine entries, 25 validators, 10 enforcement rules, 11 harness components. Engine heartbeat crash detector pinpoints native crash to SelectBestMission:smithingLoop (Quyaz, 10/10 reproducible). Root cause: BuyItemsAction missing in v1.4.7 — trade API reflection probe fails, causing native instability.

proof.highest: engine heartbeat crash pinpoint (10/10 at Quyaz smithingLoop)
proof.launcherNav: PASS (Continue, Safe Mode, game spawn, TBG READY)
proof.settlementEntry: PASS (Quyaz settlement interior reached via click)
proof.pauseDismissal: PASS (keybd_event VK_ESCAPE dismisses, game continues 5400+ ticks)
proof.autoUnpause: NOT PROVEN (service fires on campaign tick, test requires map surface)

crashLedger.rootCause: BuyItemsAction reflection probe returns missing in v1.4.7. Traded API renamed/removed.
Same engine toggle path destabilizes when trade API missing

handoff.blocker: BuyItemsAction:missing in v1.4.7. Fix requires updating MapTradeTradeActionReflection.cs to find renamed/relocated trade method.
handoff.gap: Auto-unpause not proven on campaign map. Settlement-to-map transition needed.
handoff.risk: CMD pipeline uses powershell (pwsh) which lacks Get-FileHash. Workaround: use powershell.exe explicitly.

priority.reason: Fixing BuyItemsAction requires runtime surface + live game for proof. Agent B owns runtime lane.
Auto-unpause proof requires campaign map + pause menu interaction. Agent B owns readiness.
Trade route end-to-end requires settlement nav + trade API fix + runtime proof.

dependencies: Fix MapTradeTradeActionReflection.cs to resolve BuyItemsAction in v1.4.7
Restart game to deploy new DLL
Navigate campaign map -> settlement -> trade menu
Collect engine heartbeat evidence through entire chain

nextCommand: Update MapTradeTradeActionReflection.cs to find v1.4.7 trade API, rebuild, restart, run: `$env:TBG_SESSION_MODE='Runner'; Stop-Process -Name 'TaleWorlds*' -Force; Start-Sleep 2; powershell.exe -NoProfile -Exec Bypass -File .\forge.ps1 -Launch -LaunchIntent continue -AllowFocusSteal -SessionAuthorityMode UserSession; .\scripts\tbg\Test-TbgReadinessTrigger.ps1 -Command RunAutonomousVisibleTradeRouteNow -RequiredSurface map_surface -SessionMode Runner -ReadyTimeoutSec 180 -AckTimeoutSec 120`
